ensures.text: CountChar(s + [c], ch) == CountChar(s, ch) + if c == ch then 1 else 0
CountChar(s + [c], ch) == CountChar(s, ch) + if c == ch then 1 else 0
CountChar(s + [a, b], ch) == CountChar(s, ch) + (if a == ch then 1 else 0) + if b == ch then 1 else 0
CountChar(s + [a, b], ch) == CountChar(s, ch) + (if a == ch then 1 else 0) + if b == ch then 1 else 0
HammingDist(s1 + [a1, a2], s2 + [b1, b2]) == HammingDist(s1, s2) + (if a1 != b1 then 1 else 0) + if a2 != b2 then 1 else 0
HammingDist(s1 + [a1, a2], s2 + [b1, b2]) == HammingDist(s1, s2) + (if a1 != b1 then 1 else 0) + if a2 != b2 then 1 else 0
CountBadPairs(s + [a, b]) == CountBadPairs(s) + if a == b then 1 else 0
CountBadPairs(s + [a, b]) == CountBadPairs(s) + if a == b then 1 else 0
